description: Deepen iter5: 3-seed averaging on v4 anchor. Replace single-seed predict with mean of seeds {42, 100, 200} for both global and per-type sub-models. Variance reduction. Distinct from v4 iter12 (3-seed at n_est=500); v5 anchor n_est=4000 has cv_mae_std ~5244 (vs v4 iter11 std ~4922), so seed effect may now exceed noise band.
